title: Rolling Moisture Cell
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Rolling Moisture Cell''' was an invention created by scientist [[Burro Flats]] of the [[Baobab Archives]]. By reverse-engineering the [[Hydrostatic field/Legends|hydrostatic field]] invented by the [[Gungan/Legends|Gungans]] of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]], Flats was able to create a practical device that could carry water in arid environments. The Rolling Moisture Cell gained immense popularity on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].
